summary: Iteration 65 — Admin enhancements (KPI cards, Knowledge Graph page, Lead Scoring reasoning). ALL tests PASSED. 11/11 backend pytest tests green; 100% frontend feature coverage.
critical_code_review_comments: admin.py:117 — `knowledge_graph` inlined into /api/admin/stats via _kg_stats_safe() never raises (swallows exceptions to {error: str}). Acceptable for dashboard resilience but consider also logging the error on the backend so silent KG failures are visible in supervisor logs.

recommendations.py — /api/admin/knowledge-graph/rebuild has no rate limiting or concurrency guard; repeated clicks could trigger parallel expensive rebuilds. Consider a Mongo lock doc or in-process semaphore to make it truly safe under load.
helpers.py:101 explain_lead_score — hard-coded weight table is duplicated from calculate_lead_score(). Extract shared weight constant dict and derive both to prevent drift.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (dashboard KPIs, KG page, sidebar nav, leads drawer all verified)

features_verified.admin_login: PASS — POST /api/admin/login returns JWT; frontend redirects /admin/login → /admin after submit
features_verified.admin_stats_new_fields: PASS — leads_today, leads_7d, leads_30d (monotonic), review_pending all present and ints
features_verified.admin_stats_kg_block: PASS — knowledge_graph block contains total_relationships(5924), requires_edges(672), bundle_edges(5252), products_covered(443), total_products(874), coverage_pct(50.7). requires+bundle == total.
features_verified.kg_stats_endpoint: PASS — /api/admin/knowledge-graph/stats returns full stats object; 401 without auth
features_verified.kg_top_endpoint: PASS — /api/admin/knowledge-graph/top?limit=5 returns array with slug, product_name, division, brand, recommendation_count; 401 without auth
features_verified.kg_rebuild_reachability: PASS — /api/admin/knowledge-graph/rebuild responds 401 unauthenticated (endpoint registered and guarded). Not executed per request.
features_verified.leads_list_score_reasoning: PASS — Every lead in GET /api/admin/leads?limit=3 has score_reasoning array of {points, label}
features_verified.dashboard_kpi_cards: PASS — admin-dashboard, kpi-leads-today, kpi-leads-7d, kpi-leads-30d, kpi-review-pending all render (Leads Today=0, 7d=0, 30d=1287, Review Pending=89)
features_verified.dashboard_kg_summary_card: PASS — kg-summary-card renders with 5924 edges · 672 REQUIRES · 5252 BUNDLE · 443/874 coverage · 50.7% progress bar; click navigates to /admin/knowledge-graph
features_verified.kg_page_render: PASS — admin-knowledge-graph page renders all stat cards (kg-stat-total-edges=5924, kg-stat-requires=672, kg-stat-bundle=5252, kg-stat-products-covered=443/874), kg-coverage-section (50.7% bar), kg-top-products list (10 Variabilis Cortex Screws, 49 refs each), rebuild-kg-btn and indexnow-submit-btn buttons present
features_verified.sidebar_nav_knowledge_graph: PASS — admin-nav-knowledge-graph link exists; shows active state (bg-emerald-600/20 text-emerald-400 font-semibold) on /admin/knowledge-graph
features_verified.leads_drawer_score_reasoning: PASS — Clicking view-lead-{id} opens drawer showing 'WHY THIS SCORE? (Cold · 10)' header with '+10 General inquiry' reason item

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 admin enhancements (dashboard KPIs, KG admin page, lead score reasoning) fully functional end-to-end. Rebuild Graph and IndexNow buttons were NOT clicked per the original request (long-running / external network). Backend live KG counts: 5924 edges (672 REQUIRES + 5252 BUNDLE), 443/874 products covered (50.7%).
